clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation across limbic and salience circuitry representing the broad functional domain of generating, experiencing, and regulating emotional states and mood.
This cluster maps onto dopaminergic, orbitofrontal, and striatal reward networks that functionally compute subjective worth to drive motivation and goal-directed decision-making.

Linked by their strong reliance on the default mode network, these terms represent the overarching functional axis of internal mental models, spanning self-referential thought, personal history, and understanding other minds.
